TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_nginaingayan, title = nginaingayan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/nginaingayan} }

S.FORM: sikiljavaran nua caucau a ngaingay i tayuan aicu a nginaingayan. tja kineljang uta a haka (Hak-kâ) taza nginaingayan.
S.PHON: sikiʎavaran nua ʦauʦau a ŋaiŋaj i tajuan aiʦu a ŋinaiŋajan. ʦa kinəʎaŋ uta a haka (hak-k*) taza ŋinaiŋajan.
S.FORM: sikiljavaran nua caucau a ngaingay i tayuan aicu a nginaingayan. tja kineljang uta a haka (Hak-kâ) taza nginaingayan.
S.PHON: sikiʎavaran nua ʦauʦau a ŋaiŋaj i tajuan aiʦu a ŋinaiŋajan. ʦa kinəʎaŋ uta a haka (hak-k*) taza ŋinaiŋajan.
